productName: Bodhi Original Terp Crystal - Tropicana Cookies
description: A flavor-forward sativa live resin, made from fresh-frozen Tropicanna Cookies in a closed-loop system so the dab tastes almost exactly like the plant smelled in the field. Saucy, vibrant, and intensely aromatic — with notes of orange, tropical, and citrus, with an upbeat, talkative energy.
